# Clean Java Example

A well-maintained Java project demonstrating hygiene best practices.

## Installation

```bash
mvn install
```

## Usage

```bash
java -jar target/app.jar
```

## Building

```bash
mvn package
```

## Testing

```bash
mvn test
```

## Contributing

Pull requests are welcome. Please run `mvn verify` before submitting.

## Code Style

This project uses Checkstyle for code quality enforcement.

Apache-2.0
